meaning: n.堆,大量,许多vt.堆,堆起v.堆积
examples: His clothes lay in a heap on the floor.
She piled the papers in a heap on her desk, just anyhow.
There is one database heap per database.
Medicine is littered with promised cures that fell back to earth, right into the garbage heap.
For example, one fan on Twitter asked if Heap would put a theremin on a song.
